steps.t: Cynred can be found at the lockhouse in Stangard. You should appeal to Cynred for entry to the lock-house to collect the food stores.
Food-stores can be found in the Stangard lock-house. You should collect food-stores from the sacks in the lock-house.
Horses can be found in the stables of Stangard. You should bring feed-pouches to the horses so that they will be fed.
The Men of Stangard can be found throughout the city. You should bring the men their rations for the day.
Gadda can be found near the Mead Hall in Stangard. You should speak with Gadda.
